title: Lucid to Receive New Investments from the PIF and Uber; Uber and Lucid Expand Robotaxi Partnership
text: Lucid announced new investments from PIF and Uber totaling $950 million, including $750 million from PIF and $200 million from Uber. The announcements came alongside expanded robotaxi partnership with Uber increasing vehicle commitment to at least 35,000 units. Uber's additional $200 million investment raised total Uber commitments to $550 million. PIF's $750 million represented continued strategic support for the company's long-term vision. The announcements demonstrated confidence from key strategic partners in Lucid's technology and execution plans. However, the need for continuous external funding highlighted the company's inability to self-fund operations and development.
